description: This tailoring pattern is used for the Tailoring profession. It is sold by Quartermaster Endarin. In the Tailoring Patterns category. An item.
name: Pattern: Golden Spellthread

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Pattern: Golden Spellthread Item Level 75 Binds when picked up Requires Tailoring (375) Requires The Aldor - Exalted Use: Teaches you how to create Golden Spellthread. Sell Price: 9 Golden Spellthread Item Level 75 Requires Level 60 Use: Permanently embroiders spellthread into pants, increasing healing by up to 66, spell damage by up to 22, and Stamina by 20. Max Stack: 20 Sell Price: 5 Requires Rune Thread , Primal Life (10), Primal Nether This tailoring pattern is used for the Tailoring profession. It is sold by Quartermaster Endarin. In the Tailoring Patterns category. An item.
